---
title: "My Projects"
---
## Bachelor Thesis

> This module focuses on independent academic research, including proposal development, literature analysis, and applied methodology.

<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap:20px;">

::: {.card style="padding:15px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); text-align:center;"}
![](assets/_project_pictures/_bt_rp.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
[Research Proposal →](assets/_projects/_research_proposal.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card style="padding:15px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); text-align:center;"}
![](assets/_project_pictures/_bt_lr.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
[Literature Review →](assets/_projects/_literature_review.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card style="padding:15px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); text-align:center;"}
![](assets/_project_pictures/_bt_m.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
[Coming Soon...](){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

</div>

---

## New Enterprise Development 

> This module explores the creation and evaluation of new business ventures, from idea development to market strategy and execution.

<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap:20px;">

::: {.card style="padding:15px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); text-align:center;"}
![](assets/_project_pictures/_ft_cp.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
[Concept Paper →](assets/_projects/_concept_paper.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card style="padding:15px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); text-align:center;"}
![](assets/_project_pictures/_ft_fr.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
[Feasibility Report →](assets/_projects/_feasibility_report.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card style="padding:15px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); text-align:center;"}
![](assets/_project_pictures/_ft_mr.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
[Marketing Report →](assets/_projects/_marketing_report.pdf){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card style="padding:15px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); text-align:center;"}
![](assets/_project_pictures/_ft_mv.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
[Marketing Video →](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1A4hBhPMogE){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card style="padding:15px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); text-align:center;"}
![](assets/_project_pictures/_ft_dpd.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
[Coming Soon...](){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

::: {.card style="padding:15px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); text-align:center;"}
![](assets/_project_pictures/_ft_bp.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
[Coming Soon...](){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

</div>

---

## Machine Learning & Advanced Python 

> This module covers machine learning techniques and advanced Python applications for data analysis and predictive modeling.

<div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap:20px; max-width:320px;">

::: {.card style="padding:15px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); text-align:center;"}
![](assets/_project_pictures/_ml_ca.jpg){style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:10px;"}
[Coming Soon...](){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
:::

</div>
